old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ckub","title":"C/Zephyr: include current_channel in build_signed_data() and lichen_announce_view for CCP-9 announce","description":"Add current_channel/rx_channel to lichen_announce_view, update LICHEN_ANNOUNCE_MIN_LEN to 94, update parse to read channel byte at offset 3, shift seq/IID etc. Update build_signed_data to include channel byte after seq_num in signed data.
